system.description: Offering more safety than a grapnel but less noise and bulk than a jump pack, this Battle-Brother-sized harness can be used to aid in safely descending from terrain or buildings. The simple harness fits over a character's power amour. A hook-shaped magnetic clip can then be anchored to a wide variety of surfaces as the coiled safety line slowly unspools. The Battle-Brother gains a +30 bonus to Climb Tests, and will not fall if he fails.
